Headline: Merger - Malvern College (Independent) expands to São Paulo, Brazil
Info: Malvern College, a leading UK independent school, has partnered with Bossa Nova Edulink LTDA to open Malvern College São Paulo in 2027/2028, marking its first South American campus as part of a global expansion strategy.

Headline: Leadership - Newcastle-under-Lyme School (Independent) appoints new Assistant Head Academic, Staffordshire
Info: Newcastle-under-Lyme School, an independent school in Staffordshire, is restructuring its academic leadership by adding a new Assistant Head Academic role, focusing on learning, innovation, and academic systems, with a start date of September 2026.

Headline: Merger - St Lawrence College (Independent) and Dover College (Independent) merger halted, Kent
Info: The planned merger between St Lawrence College and Dover College in Kent has been halted due to financial pressures, including falling pupil numbers, the imposition of VAT on fees, and the removal of business rates exemption.

Headline: News - Prince's Mead School (Independent) expands nursery provision, Hampshire
Info: Prince's Mead School in Hampshire is significantly expanding its nursery provision from September 2026, welcoming children from two years old and adopting a year-round model, following its merger with King Edward VI School last September. The school also announced the appointment of Anna Clark as head of nursery.

Headline: News - UK Government plans new 'V-levels' vocational qualification for 2027
Info: The UK government is planning to introduce new 'V-levels' qualifications from September 2027, offering a vocational alternative to A-levels to provide more flexible post-16 education pathways for students in England.
